General.Name: ENM Holdings Ltd
General.Description: ENM Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the retail of fashion wear and accessories in Hong Kong, the Americas, Europe, and Other Asia Pacific regions. It operates through two segments, Retail of Fashion Wear and Accessories and Investments. The company operates a chain of multi-label stores, as well as mono-brand boutiques under The Swank brand in Hong Kong; and offers menswear fashion products under the Cesare di Pino brand name. It also holds and trades in investments for short term and long-term investment returns; and involved in securities trading business. The company was formerly known as e-New Media Company Limited and changed its name to ENM Holdings Limited in June 2005. ENM Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1966 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Tower 2, Nina Tower, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong
